choose a throne:

Event: The Celtic Adventure
Event Date: 10/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E30
Direct Hit Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at the nearby enemy. On hit, the grenade stuns the target for 2 sec. The target and all enemies in a small radius around it have their physical armor reduced by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 19% / 22% / 25% for 3 sec and are afflicted by exhaustion. Every second, exhausted units take physical damage equal to 70% / 71% / 72% / 73% / 74% / 77% / 80% of the engraving owner's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15%. The exhaustion lasts for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the grenade stuns the target for 2,5 sec. The target and all enemies in a small radius around it have their physical armor reduced by 19% / 20% / 21% / 22% / 24% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec and are afflicted by exhaustion. Every second, exhausted units take physical damage equal to 80% / 81% / 82% / 83% / 84% / 87% / 90% of the engraving owner's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 8% / 9% / 10% / 12% / 14% / 17% / 20%. The exhaustion lasts for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at 3 nearby enemies. On hit, the grenade stuns the target for 3 sec. The target and all enemies in a small radius around it have their physical armor reduced by 24% / 25% / 26% / 27% / 29% / 32% / 35% for 3 sec and are afflicted by exhaustion. Every second, exhausted units take physical damage equal to 88% / 89% / 90% / 92% / 94% / 97% / 100% of the engraving owner's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 14% / 15% / 16% / 17% / 19% / 22% / 25%. The exhaustion lasts for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.
